fixtures.note: A '## Gaps' bullet entry with status: open. Before #2317, parseUatItems never scanned this section at all, so this file's real outstanding item was silently invisible.

Frontmatter declares status: human_needed with a populated human_verification: array. Before #2317, parseVerificationItems never read the frontmatter's structured array and only recognized specific body shapes, so this file read as zero items.
